name: Ch1 Control
desc: Channel 1 control: 0-Normal | 1-Short | 2-Open. NOTE: If status is <Not Connected> then it will force to Open!

name: Ch1 AFE Measurement Control
desc: Channel 1 control AFE measurement usage for calculations: 0-Disable | 1-Enable

name: Ch1 Test Mode
desc: Channel 1 test mode enable: 0-Disable | 1-Enable. NOTE: This will put channel to Normal state - ignoring detection logic!

name: Ch1 Reference Selection
desc: Channel 1 reference selection: 0-Temperature | 1-Resistance | 2-Vout | 3-Isink | 4-Vset

name: Ch1 Reference Value
desc: Channel 1 reference value based on control variable set

name: Ch1 Status
desc: Channel 1 status. 0-Normal | 1-Short | 2-Open | 3-Not Connected

name: Ch1 FSM State
desc: Channel 1 FSM state. 0-Idle | 1-Measure Vcc | 2-Measure Res | 3-Normal

name: Ch1 Ref Temperature
desc: Channel 1 temperature in degree C

name: Ch1 Ref Resistance
desc: Channel 1 resistance reference in ohm

name: Ch1 Ref Vout
desc: Channel 1 output voltage in V

name: Ch1 Ref Isink
desc: Channel 1 sink current reference in uA

name: Ch1 Ref Vset
desc: Channel 1 Vset (reference) voltage in V

name: Ch1 Ref Vth
desc: Channel 1 Vth (thevenin) voltage in V. Equivalent circuit from both DAC combined.

name: Ch1 Ref Vdac Coarse
desc: Channel 1 Vdac coarse voltage in V

name: Ch1 Ref Vdac Fine
desc: Channel 1 Vdac fine voltage in V

name: Ch1 Ref Raw DAC Fine
desc: Channel 1 raw fine DAC value

name: Ch1 Ref Raw DAC Coarse
desc: Channel 1 raw coarse DAC value

name: Ch1 Act Isink
desc: Channel 1 actual current sink value in uA

name: Ch1 Act Vout
desc: Channel 1 actual output voltage value in V

name: Ch1 Raw Isink
desc: Channel 1 raw ADC current value

name: Ch1 Raw Vout
desc: Channel 1 raw ADC voltage value

name: Ch1 AFE Vcc
desc: Channel 1 measured AFE Vcc voltage value in V

name: Ch1 AFE Res
desc: Channel 1 measured AFE resistance (pull-up + series) value in ohm
